item.name: Toast Get Menu Last Modified Timestamp

request.name: Toast Get Menu Last Modified Timestamp

description.content: A lightweight endpoint that allows you to determine if a restaurant's menu data has been updated. Toast support strongly recommends that you do not make a call to the `/menus` endpoint unless the date and time returned by the `/metadata` endpoint is more recent than the `lastUpdated` date and time. While this recommendation applies to all clients of the menus API, it is particularly important for clients that have limited bandwidth.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

Returns information about a restaurant's menus. _Important:_ Ordering integrations should use menus API V3. Other integration types should continue to use menus API V2 until further notice. See Comparing menus API V2 and V3 for more information. Contact Support: Name: Toast developer support
